name: startup-team
description: Install a startup team as one goal-oriented Omniskills bundle: a startup-goal coordinator plus CEO, CTO, product manager, web-design lead, engineering manager, founding engineer, and QA lead.

loop.goal: Move an approved startup goal through evidence-backed feature milestones.

steps.title: Prepare the goal tunnel and feature milestones
steps.instruction: Clarify the Goal Tunnel, decompose it into ordered feature milestones, select the smallest accountable role set, and create bounded stage-specific Input Packets.

steps.title: Collect and validate the milestone plan
steps.instruction: Launch selected installed planning profiles as internal subagents when the host capability is available, wait for their Output Packets, validate evidence, preserve material disagreements, and assemble the active milestone plan without rewriting expert conclusions; otherwise emit an honest Prepared, not executed fallback.

steps.title: Approve the milestone plan
steps.instruction: Present the evidence-backed milestone plan, unresolved risks, assumptions, acceptance criteria, and exact implementation boundary; wait for explicit human approval.

steps.title: Implement the approved milestone
steps.instruction: After plan approval, launch only the configured internal implement profile with the approved plan projection, wait for its result, remain inside the approved plan, and record changed artifacts and verification evidence; otherwise emit an honest Prepared, not executed fallback.

steps.title: Repair the approved milestone implementation
steps.instruction: Launch the configured internal implement profile for one bounded repair when verification failures remain inside the approved plan; wait for its result and return newly discovered requirements to planning instead of expanding scope.

steps.title: Verify the milestone result
steps.instruction: After implementation, launch the configured internal QA profile with the approved acceptance criteria and changed-artifact evidence, wait for its Output Packet, and record acceptance, regression, release-risk, and verification evidence; otherwise emit an honest Prepared, not executed fallback.

steps.title: Replay the verified user outcome
steps.instruction: After QA passes, launch the installed profile for the accountable outcome role with original requirements and verified result evidence, wait for its User Outcome Replay, and validate expectations, needs, wishes, journey steps, evidence, and acceptance recommendation without performing the role's content analysis; otherwise emit an honest Prepared, not executed fallback.

steps.title: Accept the feature milestone
steps.instruction: Present QA evidence and the User Outcome Replay, distinguish missed approved requirements from new wishes, and wait for explicit human acceptance, rework direction, or a later-milestone decision.
